nature_language: [当前位置杭州,目标位置广州,旅行人数2,旅行天数5] 打算从杭州飞到广州，待五天。我和老婆两个人玩，我们想购物、吃正宗的粤菜，求推荐
hard_logic_py:

  if activity_type(activity)=='airplane': intercity_transport_origin_activity=activity

  if innercity_transport_type(activity_transports(activity))=='metro'and metro_tickets(activity_transports(activity))!=2: result=False
